source.body_text_sample:
How we use cookies

This website uses cookies and similar technologies (collectively, referred to as "cookies") to improve your experience and support LC's vision of a better future for everyone impacted by lymphoma.

We use cookies to make the site work, monitor site usage, carry out analytics and personalise advertising.

You can continue to the site and accept all cookies. Or you can manage how we use them. Cookie Policy

Manage Cookies
Ok, continue to site
Skip to content
Login
Menu
Careers
Join the Lymphoma Coalition Team
At Lymphoma Coalition, we are dedicated to making a positive impact on the lives of individuals affected by lymphoma, including chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL). When you join our team, you become part of a global network of professionals working together to advance research, support patients, and raise awareness about lymphoma and CLL. We offer a dynamic and inclusive work environment where your skills and talents can make a meaningful impact.
Why Join Us:

Mission-Driven: Be a part of a team that is dedicated to making a positive impact on the lives of those affected by lymphoma and CLL

Global Reach: Collaborate with professionals from around the world, contributing to a diverse and inclusive work environment.

Innovation: We encourage creativity and innovation, fostering an environment where your ideas and expertise are valued.

Professional Growth: Grow professionally with opportunities for skill development and career advancement.

Meaningful W
